meta.title: AI Dev 25 x NYC Nicholas Clegg: How AWS Moved Beyond Orchestration with Strands SDK
meta.description:
Nicholas Clegg, Senior Software Engineer at AWS, discussed model-driven agents at AI Dev 25 x NYC.

Until recently, building AI agents meant wrestling with complex orchestration—state machines, rigid workflows, and endless error handling that still broke on edge cases. Strands SDK emerged from this exact struggle while developing Amazon Q and Kiro, replacing elaborate frameworks with a simple model-driven approach that lets LLMs orchestrate themselves. 

Through live demos showcasing how this works in practice, attendees learned to bootstrap agents from scratch and build multi-agent architectures—walking away ready to implement production-ready model-driven agents with the Strands SDK, regardless of their cloud platform.

--------------

Join us at AI Dev 26 x San Francisco! Tickets: https://ai-dev.deeplearning.ai/
